channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Stop burning money in 2026: How to find and cancel your unneeded subscriptions easily
item.description: The new year often brings sticker shock. A glance at our bank statements and credit card bills shows just how much we spent during the holidays, serving as a painful reminder that with the festivities behind us, we should work on getting our expenditures under control.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: A look at how federal agencies rang in the new year
item.description: With the sky filled with fireworks, the Washington Monument is illuminated as a candle as part of the 250th anniversary celebration for the United States, Thursday, Jan. 1, 2026, in Washington.
item.dc:creator: Amber Corrin, Federal News Network

item.title: NDAA scales back ambitious acquisition reforms, offers little on workforce
item.description: "Without a workforce initiative, it is hard to see the workforce having the tools to take the risks the legislation wants them to take,” Stan Soloway said. The post NDAA scales back ambitious acquisition reforms, offers little on workforce first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: US cybersecurity experts plead guilty to attacking US companies with ransomware
item.description: Two cybersecurity professionals charged with running a ransomware operation have pleaded guilty to conspiring to obstruct, delay, or affect commerce through extortion. They will be sentenced on March 12, 2026, the US Department of Justice announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Samsung's new Freestyle+ portable projector nearly doubles the brightness, and makes the image look better on any surface
item.description: Smarter features and bolder images are exactly what Samsung's projector needed needed — but what about audio and battery power?
item.dc:creator: Matt Bolton, TechRadar

item.title: AI disclosure in healthcare: What patients must know
item.description: States require AI disclosure in healthcare as California, Colorado and Utah implement laws mandating transparency when artificial intelligence influences patient care decisions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 could be lighter than ever
item.description: A new year means new foldables, and we might have learned some more about Samsung's next foldable phones.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Cloud costs now No. 2 expense at midsize IT companies behind labor
item.description: Midsize IT companies now spend huge percentages of their revenues on cloud services, driven by a growing number of AI workloads running in the cloud, according to a new survey.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Back to the future: The most popular JavaScript stories and themes of 2025
item.description: Artificial intelligence and its promise to revolutionize programming—and possibly overthrow human sovereignty—is a central story of the post-Covid world. But for JavaScript developers, it is only one of the forces contending for center stage.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: USPTO proposes dramatic restrictions on patent challenges through inter partes review
item.description: Both the patent owner and the company facing patent assertion must understand these changes and adjust their litigation strategies accordingly. The post USPTO proposes dramatic restrictions on patent challenges through inter partes review first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: How to watch The Traitors UK season 4
item.description: Claudia Winkleman and her lavish wardrobe return to Ardross Castle for a new 12-episode civilian series. Here's how to watch The Traitors UK season 4 online.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: Never lose your car with Maps parking tools
item.description: Learn how to set up Google Maps and Apple Maps on your phone to automatically remember where you parked. Step-by-step instructions for enabling location services and parking detection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From DOJ to VA, Kshemendra Paul’s journey exemplifies lasting public service
item.description: "It's so important not to get caught up and react to the moment, but to be reflective, smart and strategic, and to respond in the moment," Kshemendra Paul said. The post From DOJ to VA, Kshemendra Paul’s journey exemplifies lasting public service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta buys startup Manus in latest move to advance its artificial intelligence efforts
item.description: Meta is buying artificial intelligence startup Manus, as the owner of Facebook and Instagram continues a push to amp-up AI offerings across its platforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The top Google Pixel tips of 2025
item.description: More and more, there are Android tips — and then there are Pixel tips. Owning a Google Pixel phone has become a ticket of sorts to a uniquely top-tier type of Android experience.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta buys high-profile AI startup Manus
item.description: Meta is now buying the hyped AI startup Manus for about $2 billion, TechCrunch reported. Founded in Singapore by former Chinese entrepreneurs, Manus gained widespread attention after a viral demo video showing an AI agent that could handle everything from job interviews to stock analysis.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Foreign tech workers are avoiding travel to the US
item.description: I go to a lot of tech conferences — 13 in 2025 — and many of those I attend are outside the US; several are in London, one is in Amsterdam, another in Paris, and two in Tokyo.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What's inside Mexico's Popocatépetl? Scientists obtain first 3D images of the whole volcano
item.description: Scientists from Mexico’s National Autonomous University have created the first three-dimensional image of the Popocatépetl volcano's interior.
item.dc:creator: María Verza, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 700Credit data breach exposes SSNs of 5.8M consumers
item.description: A 2025 data breach at fintech company 700Credit exposes personal information of more than 5.8 million people through compromised third-party integration partner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: React2Shell: Anatomy of a max-severity flaw that sent shockwaves through the web
item.description: The React 19 library for building application interfaces was hit with a remote code vulnerability, React2Shell, about a month ago. However, as researchers delve deeper into the bug, the larger picture gradually unravels.
item.dc:creator: Info World
